rows.label: qev091805_MSG0001
rows.name: Murderess! You...you actually came back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0002
rows.name: Surprised? You thought I'd run for it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0003
rows.name:
Of course I did. I thought
you'd be clear on the other
side of the planet by now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0004
rows.name: So where's the perp?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0005
rows.name: In some monster's gut. Or its crap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0006
rows.name: Such a dirty mouth for a princess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0007
rows.name:
I had a bad influence.
You should meet her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0008
rows.name: Heh, maybe we can all grab a drink.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0009
rows.name:
Sounds like a plan.
You're in too, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_JNK0010
rows.name: Make Iriina Pay

rows.label: qev091805_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you'll come if Iriina buys.

rows.label: qev091805_JNK0020
rows.name: Make the Murderess Pay

rows.label: qev091805_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you'll come if the Murderess buys.

rows.label: qev091805_JNK0030
rows.name: Treat

rows.label: qev091805_SEL0031
rows.name: Offer to buy drinks for the ladies.

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0010
rows.name: Oh hell no![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0011
rows.name:
This time drinks are
DEFINITELY on the Murderess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oh, fine. I suppose I did drag you
two into a personal vendetta.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0013
rows.name:
Oh, fine. I suppose I did drag you
two into a personal vendetta.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0014
rows.name: Really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0015
rows.name:
You know we're not gonna
hold back, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0016
rows.name:
Yeah, hope your wallet
is ready for this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0017
rows.name: Mother... Father... Keep watching me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm gonna need a lot of help
along the way, but one day...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091805_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'll restore the Effinger
name to glory here on Mira.[ST:wait ]
